title: vote.rejected event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.10. Produced by epd2_voting_service.events.build_vote_rejected_event: vote_envelope_state_payload(envelope) plus reason_codes (e.g. VOTE_INTEGRITY_HASH_MISMATCH). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing vote-linkability control (CT-00-09): account_id, person_id, identity_record_id, full_name, email, membership_id, and identity_provider_reference are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema.
